messages.content: # Struggling to accelerate? Feeling like you cannot reach above a certain speed and have endless wheelspin? This guide is for you.

# Method 1
## Step 1
> Open Content Manager > Go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > About & Updates

## Step 2
> First, click on the **green box** to re-install the current patch version again over the old one.
> If that **did not** work, click on the **red box** to delete the current patch version to allow for a *clean install*

# Method 2
-# Do this if the previous method did not work.

## Step 1
> 🚨 If you are on wheel, check your pedal inputs as you may have slight braking input. The red line appearing means there is input. <<a:alarm:973783446126211092>> You should also check if your handbrake or engine brake are being activated. 🚨
